summary: All three requirements appear to be implemented. REQ-1 is addressed in internal.tsx with isSuperAdmin logic, toggleRoleAccordion, and openRoles state. REQ-2 is addressed with renderSummaryCards, toggleSection, renderMiddleSection, renderBottomSection, and sections state. REQ-3 is addressed in App.tsx with role='Admin' passed to InternalDashboard. The diff is truncated for internal.tsx so some acceptance criteria cannot be fully verified, but visible evidence is consistent with full implementation.
